error.message: Missing a Javadoc comment.
'class def lcurly' has incorrect indentation level 0, expected level should be 2.
'{' at column 1 should be on the previous line.
'(' is followed by whitespace.
')' is preceded with whitespace.
'{' at column 5 should be on the previous line.
'method def' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be 6.
'(' is followed by whitespace.
')' is preceded with whitespace.
'class def rcurly' has incorrect indentation level 0, expected level should be 2.
'annotation array initialization' child has incorrect indentation level 8, expected level should be one of the following: 2, 4.
